definition: Ability to absorb economic shocks with limited loss of output employment income credit public services and essential functions
measurement_note: Use output loss employment loss household hardship firm closure credit spread service outage and supply continuity indicators

definition: Ability to restore essential economic activity after disruption
measurement_note: Use recovery time business reopening employment restoration credit access income support infrastructure repair and service continuity indicators

definition: Ability to learn innovate reallocate resources and adjust firms workers institutions and production systems under changing conditions
measurement_note: Use workforce mobility skills innovation firm adaptation policy learning regional diversification and knowledge diffusion indicators

definition: Ability to shift development pathways when existing economic structures are no longer viable just or sustainable
measurement_note: Use just transition regional redevelopment climate transition industrial strategy new sectors ownership change and ecological viability indicators

definition: Extent to which resilience strategies protect vulnerable households workers small firms marginalized communities and exposed regions
measurement_note: Use distributional recovery wage housing access small firm support race gender disability region and income indicators

definition: Ability of governments financial institutions regulators public agencies civic organizations and economic institutions to coordinate response and investment
measurement_note: Use fiscal capacity administrative readiness public finance regulation coordination trust transparency and implementation data

definition: Administrative political legal technical financial and civic burden required to implement a strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger feasibility review capacity planning public finance review sequencing analysis and governance design
